_comment: OpenAgent E1 RISC-V SoC + Eliza system overlay. Fused product: the base device tree (board config, kernel cmdline, init.rc, sepolicy, VINTF, NPU HAL) comes from the chip team's device/eliza/eliza_ai_soc/ tree (optionally checked out under upstreams/research/chip and imported into AOSP by upstreams/research/chip/sw/aosp-device/import-aosp-device.sh). The eliza_common.mk system layer is inherited AFTER so privileged-APK / role overrides land on top. Distro identity (vendorDir, packageName, classPrefix) intentionally matches brand.eliza.json — only the product/lunch target and device-tree binding differ.

chipImport._comment: Run as: bash <script> <AOSP_ROOT>. The script rsyncs device/eliza/eliza_ai_soc/ from the chip vendor tree into the AOSP checkout. build-aosp.mjs can chain this before validate/build in a follow-up wire-up.
